case_title: MALOOF, KWIXUAN HART VS ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,847.18 FILED BY MALOOF, KWIXUAN HART AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC. DOES 1-100 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALOOF, KWIXUAN HART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC. $2,847.18 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,847.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY MEL ANNUZZI HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1997, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY MEL ANNUZZI
JUDGMENT CREDITOR MALOOF, KWIXUAN HART PRESENT ON 3/10/97 HEARING.NO POS & ORIGINAL OEX FORM FILED IN COURT 3 DAYS BEFORE HEARING DATE.
ORIGINAL OEX SUBMITTED IN COURT DURING THE HEARING NO POS BUT RECEIPT SHOWING SERVICE WAS DONE BY SHERIFF DEPT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC.
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF OCT-26-1998, GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICES, INC.
